extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael won a reduced bunch sprint after Jayco-AlUla paced hard on two categorized climbs to thin the field, Pedersen recovering from being dropped.
tactical_patterns: Jayco-AlUla controlled both climbs to shed sprinters for Matthews, investing domestique energy pre-final climb for sprinter positioning.
Evenepoel contested intermediate sprint bonus seconds despite holding pink, suggesting UAE unwilling to cede time incrementally to Roglič.
Pinot attacking twice for KOM points after being in break shows Groupama-FDJ prioritizing jersey competition over stage hunting.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: first Giro stage win since 2015 after team executed controlled attrition sprint setup on categorized terrain
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: recovered from being dropped on climb to contest sprint, showing unexpectedly strong climbing recovery for pure sprinter
rider_signals.McNULTY Brandon: negative: dropped on categorized climbs when expected to survive, early GC weakness signal for UAE backup rider
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: negative: absent from finale when terrain suited breakaway specialists, suggests poor form or team role confusion
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: negative: dropped when this exact hilly-sprint profile typically favors his puncheur characteristics
